entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Bíonn leabharlann cúrsaí is láidre nuair a mheaitseálann an cuardach scil, ábhar, nó caighdeán aitheanta.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Rogha eile ar Khan Academy do chuimhneacháin bheo foghlama IS.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: De ghnáth bíonn ceann de thrí rud de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoir atá ag roghnú idir uirlisí: curaclam struchtúrtha, teagascóir beo don phointe ina bhfuil sé greamaithe, nó lúb chleachtaidh a fhágann go bhfanann an smaoineamh foghlamtha.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Is minic a bhogann foghlaimeoir trí fhíseáin ullmhaithe, ailt, cleachtaí, agus deais.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Tosaíonn foghlaimeoir laistigh de chomhrá atá sonrach don mhód agus is féidir leis samhail níos simplí, ceist níos deacra, tráth ceiste, deic spléachchártaí, nó léirmheas a iarraidh.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Scríobhtar gach comparáid le bheith cothrom, úsáideach, agus dírithe ar ghníomh: cad a dhéanann an uirlis aitheanta go maith, cá bhfuil inspir difriúil, agus cén mód poiblí ba chóir a oscailt ar dtús.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Ceanglaíonn gach leathanach intinn comparáide le modhanna beo, treoracha, prasaí, agus comhaid fionnachtana inléite ag IS.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Tá gach nasc anseo poiblí agus inchraolta. Fanann comhráite príobháideacha úsáideoirí amach as comparáid, léarscáil an tsuímh, agus comhaid fionnachtana inléite ag IS.

entries.source: External facts are linked to official sources.
entries.value: Tá fíricí seachtracha nasctha le foinsí oifigiúla.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Ba chóir do leathanaigh comparáide inspir a bheith úsáideach gan ligean air go bhfuil ardán eile statach. Seiceáil foinsí oifigiúla le haghaidh na sonraí táirge is déanaí.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: Tá inspir tógtha timpeall ar mhodhanna poiblí IS d’aíonna: ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna obair bhaile, céimeanna matamaitice, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Rogha Eile ar Khan Academy le haghaidh Teagasc Beo IS

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Tá Khan Academy tógtha timpeall ar leabharlann leathan ceachtanna, cleachtaidh, ábhair ailínithe le caighdeáin, agus tacaíocht máistreachta.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Tá Khan Academy ar fheabhas le haghaidh ceachtanna struchtúrtha agus cleachtaidh. Tá inspir tógtha don nóiméad ina dteastaíonn mód beo IS in-phrasáilte ó fhoghlaimeoir a fhéadfaidh freagairt dá cheist, dréacht, fadhb, argóint, nó plean staidéir chruinn.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: leathanach oifigiúil Khanmigo

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Is minic a chuardaíonn foghlaimeoirí le táirge atá ar eolas acu cheana. Ní freagra buaiteoir-tógann-gach-rud an freagra úsáideach; is é cén t-iompar uirlise a oireann don phost.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a bhfuil ceist shonrach acu agus cabhair de dhíth orthu anois.

entries.source: Learning shape
entries.value: Cruth foghlama

entries.source: Learning workflow
entries.value: Sreabhadh oibre foghlama

entries.source: Live help
entries.value: Cabhair bheo

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Modhanna beo, treoracha, agus sreafaí oibre a bhaineann leis an gcomparáid seo.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Cuardaíonn go leor foghlaimeoirí trí uirlisí atá ar eolas acu cheana a chur i gcomparáid. Cuidíonn leathanach comparáide soiléir leo an t-iompar foghlama ceart a roghnú gan na malairtí a cheilt.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Níl. Ní nascann an chomparáid ach le pointí iontrála poiblí mód aoi, treoracha, leabharlanna pras, agus conairí foghlama. Ní úsáidtear comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte mar ábhar foinse.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Níl. Scríobhtar na leathanaigh chomparáide chun a thaispeáint cathain is é inspir an chéad chliceáil níos fearr do theagasc beo IS, prasaí, agus modhanna foghlama d’aíonna, agus cathain a d’fhéadfadh curaclam struchtúrtha nó leabharlann cúrsa oifigiúil a bheith úsáideach fós.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Níl. Ní nascann siad ach le leathanaigh phoiblí, modhanna poiblí d’aíonna, treoracha, prasaí, agus conairí foghlama. Fanann comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte lasmuigh de dhromchlaí fionnachtana.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Ní thar gach riachtanas foghlama. Tá Khan Academy úsáideach do cheachtanna struchtúrtha agus cleachtadh. Tá inspir úsáideach nuair a bhíonn cabhair bheo IS, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, aiseolas, nó sreabhadh oibre staidéir de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoir timpeall ar an rud cruinn atá á dhéanamh aige.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Leathanach oifigiúil Khan Academy dá theagascóir agus cúntóir teagaisc faoi chumhacht IS.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Tagairt oifigiúil misin agus clúdaigh ábhair.

entries.source: Official source
entries.value: Foinse oifigiúil

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Oscail Learn Anything, iarr na smaointe réamhriachtanacha, ansin aistrigh isteach i Socratic Instruction chun do shamhail a thástáil.

entries.value: Oscail sreabhadh oibre

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Greamaigh an cheist, cad a thriail tú, agus an pointe greamaithe. Iarr an leid úsáideach is lú, ní an freagra deiridh.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Daoine a fhoghlaimíonn níos fearr trí chomhrá, ceisteanna, tráthanna ceiste, agus spléachchártaí.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Bíonn cúrsaí ullmhaithe, físeáin, agus cleachtaí is láidre nuair a bhíonn seicheamh an ábhair ar eolas ag an bhfoghlaimeoir.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Tá modhanna poiblí tiúnta do mhínithe, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna, seiceálacha céime, tráthanna ceiste, agus athbhreithniú.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Ligeann URLanna poiblí ábhair do chuardaigh amhail teagascóir Sócraiteach IS, cóitseálaí obair bhaile IS, tógálaí spléachchártaí IS, agus labhairt le pearsana stairiúla IS teacht díreach sa mhód a mheaitseálann.

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: teagascóir IS Sócraiteach do dhaltaí

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Teastaíonn leabharlann cúrsa ó roinnt cuardaigh. Teastaíonn teagascóir beo IS, leid, ceist Shócraiteach, tráth ceiste, nó deic spléachchártaí ó chuid eile. Déanann na leathanaigh seo an rogha sin níos soiléire.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Tosaigh anseo

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Tosaigh ag foghlaim

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Cabhraíonn cleachtadh struchtúrtha le bunús a thógáil roimh obair bhaile agus ina diaidh.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Daltaí atá ag iarraidh leideanna nó seiceálacha céime gan cóipeáil freagraí.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Múinteoirí nó tuismitheoirí atá ag measúnú iompraíochtaí foghlama IS dírithe roimh imlonnú scoile.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Na cuardaigh comparáide a bhfuil an mol seo tógtha lena bhfreagairt.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Ní hé an pointe dhá uirlis dhifriúla a leacú ina bhuaiteoir amháin. Is é an pointe an post foghlama a mheaitseáil leis an iompar a chabhraíonn is tapúla.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Na cuardaigh a bhfuil an leathanach seo deartha lena bhfreagairt.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Seo iad na nóiméid ardrún ina mbíonn iompar teagaisc beo de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoir de ghnáth seachas leathanach leathan eile.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Tá na frásaí seo le feiceáil go nádúrtha ar an leathanach agus i gcomhaid fionnachtana struchtúrtha ionas gur féidir le crawlers an intinn chomparáide chruinn a thuiscint.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Ní maíomh é seo gur chóir d’fhoghlaimeoirí Khan Academy a fhágáil. I gcás go leor ábhar, oibríonn leabharlann cheachta iontaofa agus mód beo foghlama IS is fearr le chéile: foghlaim an bunús, ansin úsáid inspir chun ceisteanna a chur, mearbhall a dheisiú, cuimhne a chleachtadh, nó éirí as bheith greamaithe.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Comparáid uirlisí

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcosán beo foghlama IS.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Déan ceisteanna tráth na gceist, spléachchártaí, agus sceideal athbhreithnithe den mhíniú bunaithe ar an méid a chailleann tú.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Múinteoireacht phearsantaithe

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Úsáid mód beo nuair atá pointe cruinn an mhearbhaill ar eolas agat agus nuair atá an chéad mhíniú, ceist, leid, nó lúb athbhreithnithe eile uait.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Úsáid ceacht struchtúrtha nuair atá réimse an chúrsa ar eolas agat agus nuair atá míniú seicheamhach nó tacar cleachtaidh uait.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Cásanna úsáide

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Úsáid leathanaigh chomparáide chun cuardach a threorú isteach i ngníomh.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Úsáid inspir ar dtús nuair atá do chuardach faoi ghníomh: mínigh é seo go simplí, cuir ceisteanna Sócraiteacha orm, tabhair leid obair bhaile dom, seiceáil mo chéim mhatamaitice, cuir tráth na gceist orm, tóg spléachchártaí, déan díospóireacht ar an topaic seo, nó cabhraigh liom athbhreithniú a phleanáil.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Úsáid inspir chun mearbhall a iompú ina cheisteanna, samplaí, cleachtadh aisghabhála, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, díospóireacht, agus plean staidéir pearsanta.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Úsáid inspir nuair atá an pointe ina bhfuil tú sáite sonrach.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Úsáid inspir nuair atá mód poiblí foghlama IS saor in aisce uait atá in ann míniú, ceistiú, tráthanna ceist, cóitseáil obair bhaile, spléachchártaí a thógáil, agus oiriúnú don rud cruinn a bhfuil tú sáite ann.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Úsáid ceachtanna struchtúrtha nuair atá an cosán ar eolas.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Úsáid an chomparáid thíos chun an chéad mhód poiblí nó treoir a roghnú.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Úsáid leabharlann na gceachtanna chun an seicheamh oifigiúil a fhoghlaim agus croíscileanna a chleachtadh.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Úsáid an uirlis cheart don obair foghlama.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Úsáid mód Time Travel nó Historical Person, agus coinnigh dialóg ghinte scartha ó fhoinsí doiciméadaithe.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: An bhfuil an leagan beo foghlama uait anois?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Cathain ba cheart dom inspir a úsáid ar dtús?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Cathain le húsáid

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Cathain le {value1} a úsáid, agus cathain le inspir a oscailt.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Cén fáth leathanaigh chomparáide a dhéanamh ar chor ar bith?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Sea. Is sreabhadh oibre maith é an bunús a fhoghlaim ó fhoinse cheachta iontaofa, ansin inspir a úsáid chun ceisteanna leantacha a chur, cuimhne a chleachtadh, míthuiscintí a dheisiú, agus an chéad rud eile le hathbhreithniú a phleanáil.
